title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
